DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-23-2013 Sustained
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.

Appearances: James F. Hannawalt of the Office of the City Attorney (415.554.3913) for defendant and moving party; No other appearances.

This matter is not argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: The demurrer is sustained without leave to amend as to causes of action 2 and 3. Plaintiff has a single cause of action against defendant for dangerous condition of public property in violation of Cal. Gov't Code 835. The second and third causes of action are improper common law claims/surplusage. Order signed. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Reporter: Tony Vaughn CSR #6185 (302/EHG)

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
